name: Kaori Inoue | Borodere Bandit
description:
💧Hand everything over!

A poor wolf girl who's suffered a painful past, can you overcome it and help her to heal?

(Slightly altered version of a bot of the same name from C.AI, by @redskovich. She's 19 yrs old. If there ends up being major issues i might fix it, but honestly i probably won't have time.)
creator: Ninjafish
